## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Deepgram and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and data analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [30 content assignments approved; GrowthX to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Content audit underway; pruning strategy to be presented next week](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard provides comprehensive traffic and SEO insights](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Significant traffic from AI apps pages (e.g., Cutout Pro) needs further analysis for relevance and impact](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Calibration

  - [30 assignments approved; content clusters align with SEO goals](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [First calibration blog on voice activity detection shared](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce 3 more blogs; team to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Custom article generation pipeline possible for specific needs (e.g., more technical API information)](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Content Audit and Pruning Strategy

  - [Combining data from Google Search Console, SEMrush, and lead reports](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Analyzing 6-month periods for clicks, impressions, and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Will provide recommendations for pruning irrelevant content](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Google considers overall website relevance for rankings](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - ["Best speech to text APIs" article shows 66% drop in clicks (7,200 to 2,781)](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Article ranks on page one for "speech to text API"](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Team to refresh and update important articles, especially for LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Looker Dashboard Introduction

  - [Combines data from Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Tracks sessions, engaged sessions, landing page performance, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Allows filtering by content clusters, date ranges, and traffic sources](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Provides query rankings and non-branded keyword performance](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### AI Apps Traffic Analysis

  - [Cutout Pro drives significant traffic (62,000 clicks) despite being unrelated to Deepgram's core offering](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Team to investigate user journeys from AI apps pages using GA4 exploration reports](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Concern about potential negative impact on Google's perception of site relevance](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### LLM Referral Traffic

  - [Dashboard shows breakdown of traffic from various LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Unexpected referrals from queries like "Vedic astrology" noted](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to continue scaling content production](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Hasan to provide wireframes for programmatic content pages](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [GrowthX to present concrete pruning plan next week](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Set up GA4 exploration report for AI apps traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Team to review Looker dashboard and discuss findings in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/iLKyrsPsitp-Aj86sBETqnCan-f-Vsxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
